name: Cheddar Cheese Meatloaf C/p
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine cracker crumbs, onion, green pepper, chili sauce, milk, eggs, salt, and pepper.
2. Add ground beef and shredded cheddar cheese to the mixture. Mix until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Form the mixture into a 6 or 7 inch round loaf.
4. Place the loaf on a piece of cheesecloth that fits over the slow cooker rack.
5. Gently lift the loaf onto the rack in the slow cooker.
6. Loosely fold the cheesecloth over the top of the meat.
7. Cover and cook on low for about 5 hours, or until the meatloaf is done.
8. Using the cheesecloth ties, carefully remove the cooked loaf from the slow cooker.
9. Remove the cheesecloth and cut the meat into 6 or 7 wedges.
This recipe was formatted by Lynn Thomas. Source: Crockery Cookery by Mable Hoffman. I made this in November 1996 and it turned out very good. The only addition I made was 3 cloves of minced garlic.
